meta.title: Rubin OS — Multi-Agent & Skills Map
meta.note: Curated knowledge graph of the ROS multi-agent system. Hand-built for signal; same schema a /graphify run emits, so it can be regenerated/enriched later.

nodes.label: Claude / Cowork
nodes.desc: Interactive ROS agent. Routes requests, runs domain skills, reviews output, holds the human-gating decision points. The conductor of the loop.

nodes.label: Codex
nodes.desc: Coding / file-system agent. Heavy lifting — bulk implementation on [codex] branches — while Claude orchestrates and gates merges.

nodes.label: Hermes
nodes.desc: WSL automation runtime. Owns the connector layer (himalaya mail, Notion) and runs scheduled routines — keeps loops turning between human touchpoints.

nodes.label: CoS
nodes.desc: Operating layer above all agents. Runs the rhythm of the business — right work, right agent, right time.
nodes.triggers: weekly review, OKRs, strategy, blockers, cross-domain, orchestrate

nodes.label: KK
nodes.desc: Daily execution — inbox, calendar, tasks, scheduling. Handles the now; CoS handles direction.
nodes.triggers: today, inbox, calendar, schedule, follow-up, urgent

nodes.label: HV
nodes.desc: Dutch real-estate deals, BRRRR models, permits, WWS, tenants. The EU dual-exit development engine.
nodes.triggers: deal, property, BRRRR, rent, permit, vergunning, WWS, Funda

nodes.label: EA
nodes.desc: Client-facing architecture — HLDs, ADRs, cloud strategy, security architecture. Always confirms which client first.
nodes.triggers: architecture, HLD, ADR, cloud, ZTA, CCoE, security architect, client

nodes.label: PAI
nodes.desc: Product thinking for Guy's ventures — PRDs, MVPs, pricing, GTM, AI product design. Home of Arbor & the three-engine loop.
nodes.triggers: product, PRD, MVP, roadmap, pricing, venture, GTM, parenting app

nodes.label: MKT
nodes.desc: Content, copy, campaigns, brand, social. Turns positioning into channel-specific, conversion-focused assets.
nodes.triggers: content, post, LinkedIn, blog, campaign, brand, copy, social

nodes.label: FIN
nodes.desc: Invoices, insurance, contracts, tax, subscriptions, compliance. The back-office ledger of the group.
nodes.triggers: invoice, insurance, contract, compliance, bank, tax, subscription, legal

nodes.label: weekly-review
nodes.desc: Structured cross-domain review every week.

nodes.label: okr-tracker
nodes.desc: Set & track quarterly objectives.

nodes.label: project-tracker
nodes.desc: Milestones, vendors, blockers.

nodes.label: stakeholder-briefing
nodes.desc: Board / investor / client reports.

nodes.label: inbox-manager
nodes.desc: Triage & prioritise email.

nodes.label: task-manager
nodes.desc: Capture & manage tasks / priorities.

nodes.label: deal-analyzer
nodes.desc: Structured acquisition assessment.

nodes.label: brrrr-calculator
nodes.desc: Buy-Reno-Rent-Refi-Repeat model.

nodes.label: deal-note-creator
nodes.desc: Document a new deal / asset.

nodes.label: permit-pathway
nodes.desc: Dutch permit / vergunning strategy.

nodes.label: wws-analyzer
nodes.desc: WWS points & rent ceiling.

nodes.label: architecture-review
nodes.desc: Assess architecture / cloud strategy.

nodes.label: hld-writer
nodes.desc: High-level design document.

nodes.label: adr-writer
nodes.desc: Architecture decision record.

nodes.label: prd-generator
nodes.desc: Product requirements / MVP scope.

nodes.label: pricing-strategy
nodes.desc: Pricing model & price point.

nodes.label: gtm-strategist
nodes.desc: Go-to-market strategy.

nodes.label: campaign-planner
nodes.desc: Plan a marketing campaign.

nodes.label: content-creator
nodes.desc: Produce written content assets.

nodes.label: copywriter
nodes.desc: Conversion-focused copy.

nodes.label: email-composer
nodes.desc: Outbound email; auto-selects the right account. Cross-domain.

nodes.label: notion-sync
nodes.desc: Create / update Notion pages. Cross-domain.

nodes.label: research
nodes.desc: Information gathering & synthesis. Cross-domain.

nodes.label: voice-extract
nodes.desc: Calibrate writing-voice profile. Cross-domain.

nodes.label: session-audit
nodes.desc: Capture learnings at wrap-up. Cross-domain.

nodes.label: ros-workflow
nodes.desc: Meta: navigate / route the system. Cross-domain.

nodes.label: compliance-mapper
nodes.desc: Maps a system to a regulatory/control framework → requirement→control→evidence→gap matrix. Read-only.

nodes.label: security-reviewer
nodes.desc: Security-architecture review lens — ranked, evidenced findings. Read-only.

nodes.label: threat-modeler
nodes.desc: Structured STRIDE threat model → threat register with mitigations. Read-only.

nodes.label: security-review
nodes.desc: Security-architecture + code review tailored to EA client context (NIS2/ISO27001/NIST).

nodes.label: threat-model
nodes.desc: STRIDE threat model on a system / design / data flow.

nodes.label: zero-trust-assessment
nodes.desc: Zero Trust / IAM / privileged-access posture (esp. Azure/Entra). Boortmalt D4.

nodes.label: iso27001-nist-mapping
nodes.desc: Map to ISO 27001 Annex A / NIST CSF → control-gap matrix. Boortmalt D2/D5.

nodes.label: nis2-control-mapping
nodes.desc: Map to NIS2 obligations → requirement→control→evidence matrix.

nodes.label: azure-tenant-separation-review
nodes.desc: Carve-out / tenant separation security. Boortmalt D3/D8/D9.

nodes.label: ai-eval-harness
nodes.desc: Version-pinned eval suites + LLM-as-judge for Arbor AI features. Safety-first.

nodes.label: arbor-competitor-benchmark
nodes.desc: Benchmark Arbor vs rivals across its six surfaces → gap + pricing matrix.

nodes.label: Web search & research
nodes.desc: Live web, source triangulation, citation capture · prefer primary sources.

nodes.label: Browser / computer use
nodes.desc: Portals, forms, dashboards · no sends/purchases/deletes without confirmation.

nodes.label: Video & multimodal
nodes.desc: Recordings, screenshots, transcripts → evidence, timelines, UI states.

nodes.label: Document intelligence
nodes.desc: OCR, summarize, compare PDFs/scans/decks → Markdown-first artifacts.

nodes.label: Data analysis & automation
nodes.desc: Scripts, tables, charts, repeatable checks · verify outputs.

nodes.label: Knowledge-base maintenance
nodes.desc: Atomic, linked Markdown notes · update the right MEMORY.md.

nodes.label: Gmail · bguy
nodes.desc: Primary account. CoS / KK / EA / PAI / MKT correspondence.

nodes.label: Gmail · joseph
nodes.desc: Joseph (EA lead) — send/receive for EA work; attachments via himalaya.

nodes.label: Gmail · hollandvest
nodes.desc: HollandVest account — HV only.

nodes.label: Notion
nodes.desc: Command Center, Projects, Tasks, Decisions, dashboards.

nodes.label: Google Calendar
nodes.desc: Scheduling & time-blocks.

nodes.label: Google Drive
nodes.desc: Document store & exports.
